heroHeadline: 42 Active Processes — From Gaza to DRC, Peace Architecture Under Strain
heroSubtitle: Tracking active negotiations, ceasefires, and reconciliation efforts across 30+ conflict zones. 11 ceasefires in force; 8 processes collapsed since 2020. Global conflict cost reaches $17.5T annually.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN, African Union, IGAD, Crisis Group, USIP, PA-X Database, and Tier 1–3 sources across all media poles.
